Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: robert s. bartlett, esq., bartlett, leader-picone & young, llp., 510.444.2404, for plaintiff oakville produce partners, llc; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling with modification. PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS, LLC'S Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B Cole As Receiver. Granted. No opposition filed. ruling stayed until December 4, 2012. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
